testCases.title: Verify navigation to Sandbox page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to Lessons page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to FAQ page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to Login page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'

testCases.title: Attempt to subscribe with a valid email
steps: Click locator `page.locator('xpath=//a[contains(text(), "Start learning web scraping today")]')`
Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'
expected: User should be redirected to lessons page after successful input

testCases.title: Verify navigation to Spoofing Headers page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/advanced/?gotcha=headers'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to Logins & Session Data page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/advanced/?gotcha=login'
expected: Logins & Session Data page loads successfully

testCases.title: Verify navigation to CSRF & Hidden Values page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/advanced/?gotcha=csrf'
expected: CSRF & Hidden Values page loads successfully
